creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reading the comment found in:
sys/contrib/openzfs/lib/libzfs/libzfs_dataset.c
it looks like you need to set the property zoned=off
so it allows sharenfs to be done in a non-global zone.

However, "man zfsprops" indicates that zoned is a Linux
only property, so I don't know if you can set it?
